About

Data analyst with a commerce edge.

I'm a B.Com (Program) student at Sri Guru Gobind Singh College of Commerce, Delhi University, currently in my 5th semester. Alongside my degree, I work as a Data Analyst Intern at Analytics Career Connect, where I apply SQL, Excel, and Power BI to real market-research problems for a US & Canada-focused EdTech startup.

My commerce background gives me a head start on understanding business context — margins, KPIs, market structure. My analytics stack lets me act on it: query the data, model it, and visualize it in a way decision-makers can use.

That's the gap I want to fill at a Big 4 firm or global MNC: most analysts can build the dashboard, fewer can tell you why the number matters to the business — I can do both.
